metadata.author: Huynh Nhat Huyen
metadata.description: Automated ML pipeline for Vietnam and Nasdaq stock price prediction

tool.description: Open-source EL platform. Extracts daily OHLCV data from exchange APIs (Yahoo Finance, VNDirect) and loads into PostgreSQL. Handles schema evolution, retries, and incremental syncs with no custom scraper code.

Relational database for structured time-series data. Stores raw OHLCV, cleaned features, and daily predictions in typed, indexed tables. ACID transactions prevent partial writes from corrupting training data.

SQL-first transformation framework. Builds version-controlled, tested feature tables (SMA-5/20, RSI-14, MACD, Bollinger Bands) from raw PostgreSQL tables. Equivalent to clean_ohlcv() + add_indicators() but running inside the database.

Document-oriented NoSQL database. Stores schema-flexible data: raw API JSON responses, financial news, model experiment logs (hyperparameters, MAE, RMSE, Dir accuracy per run), and model registry metadata.

Workflow scheduler that runs pipeline steps as DAGs on a cron schedule. Manages task dependencies, retries, SLA monitoring, and failure alerting. Triggers Airbyte syncs, dbt runs, model training, and inference automatically.

stage.name: ingestion
stage.description: Extract OHLCV data from exchange APIs and load into raw.stock_prices (PostgreSQL).

stage.name: transformation
stage.description: Clean raw prices and compute technical indicator features inside the database.

stage.name: training
stage.description: Retrain LSTM models on the latest data window; log metrics to MongoDB.

parameters.param: LSTM-64 -> BatchNorm -> LSTM-32 -> Dense (Huber loss, Adam 5e-4)
MongoDB: experiments.runs (MAE, RMSE, Dir accuracy, hyperparameters)

stage.name: inference
stage.description: Generate next-day price predictions using the latest saved model.

parameters.param: PostgreSQL: features.ml_ready (last WINDOW rows per ticker)

stage.name: serving
stage.description: Expose predictions via REST API and interactive dashboard.

parameters.param: Candlestick chart, metric cards, one-click prediction button

stage.name: monitoring
stage.description: Track prediction quality daily and detect model drift.

parameters.param: Rolling-7-day MAE and direction accuracy vs historical baseline
Email / Slack if MAE > 2x baseline (model drift)
Auto-trigger weekly retraining DAG on drift detection

dag.description: Weekday pipeline: ingest, transform, infer, monitor
Sunday retraining: full retrain and model evaluation

table.name: raw.stock_prices
table.columns: ticker VARCHAR, date DATE, open FLOAT, high FLOAT, low FLOAT, close FLOAT, volume BIGINT, adjusted_close FLOAT

table.name: features.technical
table.columns: ticker VARCHAR, date DATE, sma5 FLOAT, sma20 FLOAT, rsi14 FLOAT, macd FLOAT, macd_h FLOAT, bb_w FLOAT

table.name: predictions.daily_forecast
table.columns: ticker VARCHAR, date DATE, predicted_log_return FLOAT, predicted_close FLOAT, direction VARCHAR(4), model_version VARCHAR

collection.name: experiments.runs
collection.description: Training run logs: hyperparameters, MAE, RMSE, Dir accuracy, timestamp

collection.name: monitoring.daily_metrics
collection.description: Daily MAE and direction accuracy vs baseline

collection.name: raw_api.responses
collection.description: Raw JSON responses from exchange APIs before parsing

reference.author: dbt Labs
reference.title: dbt Documentation — Transform data in your warehouse

reference.author: Sculley, D. et al.
reference.title: Hidden Technical Debt in Machine Learning Systems. Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS), 28

reference.author: Zaharia, M. et al.
reference.title: Accelerating the Machine Learning Lifecycle with MLflow. IEEE Data Engineering Bulletin, 41(4)
